---
title: "E3"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

# E3:

## Preparation: Install Git

Shell: program that runs other programs and it looks like an R console. RStudio has a shell terminal that is right next to the R console –\>tab Terminal.

```{r}

```

## Exercise A: Introduce myself using the Terminal

```{r}

git config --global user.name "kesslan3"   # proper name or a pseudonym
git config --global user.email "kesslan3@students.zhaw.ch" # your (student) mailadress 
```

Initialize Git Version Control

Opening last weeks

igit init
